welcome: 🛡 SVOY — fraud protection I help check suspicious messages, links and phone numbers.
help: Send me text, a link, a phone number or a photo — I'll check it.
safe: ✅ No obvious signs of fraud detected.
report_thanks: Thank you! You're helping protect others. 🛡
rate_limited: ⏳ Too many requests. Please wait a minute.
error: 😔 An error occurred. Try again later.
send_message: Send a suspicious message, link or phone number — I'll check it. 🛡
ocr_no_text: Could not recognize text. Try sending a clearer photo.
phone_not_found: Number not found in scam database.
brand_warning: Domain contains '{keyword}' but is not the official website
